news.title: UK Institute Is Hunting for Dangers Lurking in AI
news.snippet: The government’s A.I. Security Institute, staffed by alumni from OpenAI and Google, is becoming a model for countries grappling with A.I.’s emerging risks.

news.title: One Job That Is Growing in the A.I. Era? Cybersecurity Experts.
news.snippet: Demand for security engineers has surged as artificial intelligence generates a glut of new code and models like Anthropic’s Mythos create new concerns.

news.title: Our Field Trip to Google I/O + A Sit-Down With Sundar Pichai + System Update
news.snippet: “This is the only recent gathering of a large number of people where mentions of A.I. did not produce a large chorus of boos.”

news.title: Sundar Pichai Understands Why People Are Anxious About A.I.
news.snippet: After a busy Google I/O, the company’s chief executive sits down with the hosts of “Hard Fork” to discuss the future of Google Search, how he’s using A.I. agents and his advice for college graduates.

news.title: As A.I. Fever Rises in Silicon Valley, Pope Leo Has a Few Words
news.snippet: The American pope wants to take artificial intelligence down a notch. Is he challenging the tech companies, or will tech take over the papacy?

news.title: Trump Cancels Signing of Executive Order Granting Oversight of A.I. Models
news.snippet: The president said he postponed the executive order, which would give the government power to evaluate A.I. models before their release, over concerns about “aspects of it.”

news.title: Gov. Gavin Newsom to Sign Executive Order Aimed at A.I. Job Loss
news.snippet: Gov. Gavin Newsom issued an executive order to explore an overhaul of labor policies to deal with potential mass job displacement from artificial intelligence.

news.title: Soundtrack to 8,000 Job Cuts: A Meta Worker’s Layoff-Themed A.I. Songs
news.snippet: On a dark day of layoffs at Meta, one employee responded by creating an internal radio station that plays songs about job cuts — generated by artificial intelligence, of course.

news.title: OpenAI Prepares to File for an I.P.O. in Coming Weeks
news.snippet: OpenAI would be one of the most highly anticipated potential initial public offerings, in what is set to be a major year of I.P.O.s for Silicon Valley.

news.title: AI may speed up search for drugs to treat brain conditions
news.snippet: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.

news.title: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
news.snippet: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".

news.title: 'At a loss for words' - Destiny 2 fans react to news support is ending

news.title: Meta settles social media addiction case with US school district
news.snippet: The trial had been set as a test case for 1200 other school districts making similar claims.

news.title: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
news.snippet: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.

news.title: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
news.snippet: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.

news.title: Google to release first smart glasses since Google Glass flop
news.snippet: The glasses will go on sale sometime in autumn and allow Google's artificial intelligence product to interact with a user.

news.snippet: As attackers ramp up their AI exploit development, the search for software vulnerabilities is changing rapidly.

news.title: What ClickUp’s mass layoff tells us about the future of work

news.title: The pope’s AI encyclical isn’t really about AI
news.snippet: Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical uses AI as a lens to diagnose older problems: concentrated power, eroding democracy, and a tech elite that shapes the world to its own advantage.

news.title: These special phone and app features can help protect you from spyware
news.snippet: Apple, Meta, and Google offer special security modes that provide your devices more secure against targeted spyware attacks. Here are how those modes work, what they do, and how to switch them on.

news.title: 对话云鲸CEO张峻彬：理解人性，告别天真
news.snippet:
作者 | 黄楠
  编辑 | 袁斯来
  36岁时，云鲸CEO张峻彬意识到，自己不能再只做一个温和的人。
  他做过一些得罪人的决定，但更多时候，张峻彬不善于说重话，以至于有人私下说他有些优柔寡断。“公司内部都说，要是彬哥对你的评价是‘还行’，说明你这东西已经很烂了。”他自己开玩笑。
  过去几年

news.title: 对话欧洲地图商TomTom：中国订单暴涨10倍，帮助中国辅助驾驶出海｜最前线
news.snippet:
中国汽车出海，离不开“地图”
  当下，中国车企全球化进程正全面提速，出海已经从企业的可选增量，变为行业确定性增长主线。比亚迪、奇瑞等企业海外销量规模持续走高，小鹏、蔚来、理想、小米等新势力车企也纷纷发力海外高端市场。
  区别于过往靠性价比、电动化优势打开市场的模式，现阶段中国车企出海的核心壁垒转变为智能化。在海外市场竞争中，智能座舱与高阶辅助驾驶，已经成为

news.title: 华为发布AIDC数据基础设施全栈方案，覆盖数据湖至智能体框架五大层级
